response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React/Nest.js expertise, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background includes scalable systems, microservices, and pragmatic architecture, though his recent career gap and focus on AI-agent infrastructure may require validation. The high on-site presence requirement could be addressed by discussing his availability.
strengths: Proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React/Nest.js across multiple roles
Experience with scalable systems, microservices, and high-performance databases
Strong collaborative and testing-focused development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Recent 5-year career gap not explained in resume
Limited PostgreSQL experience (primarily MongoDB/other DBs in listed roles)
Primary focus on AI-agent infrastructure may not align with renovation/energy workflows
